final_prompt.prompt:
Create a 9-grid cover image for a Xiaohongshu (Little Red Book) post featuring a DJI Pocket 4 review.

Style/medium: needs a "素人风格" (authentic amateur creator) aesthetic — exact stylistic interpretation is yours
Composition: must be 9-grid layout, centered title placement
Subject: must include the DJI Pocket 4 product as the focal element
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an approachable, casual creator atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a cute, differentiated direction — exact color values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "大强pocket4初体验" (centered, cute and differentiated typography)
Constraints: must be vertical cover image format suitable for Xiaohongshu platform
Avoid:
